name: ASMR / Sensory
description: Pure-sensory micro-content: macro close-ups + diegetic foley as the hero. 30-90s, 9:16, slow-paced, 3-8 clips. Sound is the differentiator (most feeds scroll on mute; ASMR is built to convert sound-on into save+rewatch). Music typically OFF or sub-perceptual ambient at -25dB. Niches: beauty (cream texture), food, unboxing, slime, spa rituals, crafts. Distinct from food-beverage (appetite-trigger) — this is cross-category sensory across any subject.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter — ultra-macro, texture-heavy keyframes (extreme close-up, shallow DOF, glistening micro-detail). One key per sensory beat (3-8 total).
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter — slow-motion macro motion, 5s clips per shot (3-8 total). generate_audio: false; foley is added in composition, never trusted to the i2v model.
stackSummary.voiceover: OFF by default. If used: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 in whisper mode, voice_settings stability 0.6 / style 0.05 (calm, breathy). Mixed at -3dB below the foley bed so VO never overpowers diegetic sound.
stackSummary.captions: Optional silent text overlays only (e.g. 'no music · sound on') — NEVER karaoke or hormozi. If captions on, MinimalCaptions, low-opacity, no entrance animation.
stackSummary.music: OFF by default. Optional sub-perceptual ambient bed via ElevenLabs Music at -25dB ('quiet ambient pad, no melody, no rhythm, sub-bass drone'). Foley/SFX (tap, sizzle, fizz, drip, squelch, rip) is the actual hero — sourced from a library or ElevenLabs Music's SFX prompts.

constants.structure: 0-3s establish surface → 3-(N-3)s slow procedural sensory beats → final 3s reveal / state-change
constants.pace: slow — minimum 1.5s per shot, no fast cuts, no snap zooms

variationAxes: category (beauty-cream / food / unboxing / slime / spa-ritual / craft)
audio source (live diegetic recording / synthesized SFX library / ElevenLabs Music SFX prompts)
doNotCopyLiterally: Subject, sensory beats, exact prompts, foley layering. Vibe reference only.
referenceNotes: User reference is NOT required for generic sensory subjects (anonymous cream, generic chocolate bar, slime). However, AGENTS.md hard rule #3 still applies: if the brief names a real brand or product (e.g. 'Charlotte Tilbury Magic Cream', 'Lindt Excellence 70%'), a reference photo of the actual packaging is required — refuse otherwise. AI-improvised branding on a real product reads as fake, even at macro scale.
